category_sources: source_facts.description says sslh forwards connections based on the first data packet; official sslh documentation describes it as an ssl/ssh multiplexer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sslh; current_curation.display-name is sslh.
docs_sources: Official project site hosts README and configuration documentation for sslh.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official sslh download page says sslh is managed in Git and pushed to GitHub, linking to https://github.com/yrutschle/sslh.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it forwards connections by initial packet; official README documents SSH/TLS/OpenVPN port multiplexing.
